Name: FAnimNode_CCDIK
Description: Controller which implements the CCDIK IK approximation algorithm

Variables.Name: EffectorLocation
Variables.Description: Coordinates for target location of tip bone - if EffectorLocationSpace is bone, this is the offset from Target Bone to use as target location

Variables.Name: EffectorTarget
Variables.Description: If EffectorTransformSpace is a bone, this is the bone to use.

Variables.Name: Precision
Variables.Description: Tolerance for final tip location delta from EffectorLocation

Variables.Name: MaxIterations
Variables.Description: Maximum number of iterations allowed, to control performance.

Variables.Name: bStartFromTail
Variables.Description: Toggle drawing of axes to debug joint rotation

Variables.Name: bEnableRotationLimit
Variables.Description: Tolerance for final tip location delta from EffectorLocation

Variables.Name: RotationLimitPerJoints
Variables.Description: symmetry rotation limit per joint. Index 0 matches with root bone and last index matches with tip bone.
